function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-31T16:32:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - nina@finance-workflow.example
subject: "Re: Could you resend the invoice?"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_30__eur_000530__inv_0003__northstar_backfill_gamma.md
related_entities:
  - nina
---
Hi Nina,

Sure — I’m resending the requested invoice from 2025-12-30 (Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH) as an attachment.

Best,
Miles

Canonical entity record 10_entities/cast/nina.md confirms sender email nina@finance-workflow.example, matching inbox `from`. Invoice file 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_30__eur_000530__inv_0003__northstar_backfill_gamma.md matches requested date and counterparty. Outbound draft was created per sending-email workflow, then inbox item was deleted per process-next-inbox-item and inbox-processing-v2-update.
